dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In a world ravaged by dimensional rifts, humanity clung to survival. But for those like Lee Jinwoo, survival was a daily struggle, not a victory.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Another day, another empty stomach. This 'safe zone' is a joke.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Just a Scavenger Rat. Good. Maybe I can at least get some protein...

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Damn it! Even a rat is too fast for me. My 'E-rank' status is practically a death sentence.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: No, no, no... Not a Goblin. Not here!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: A scrawny Goblin, its eyes glinting with malice, emerged from the shadows. For Jinwoo, even this low-level monster was an insurmountable wall.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Ugh! My arm! It's too fast!

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: This is it, isn't it? After all this struggling, I'm going to die to a Goblin in some forgotten alley.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: As the Goblin raised its crude club for a finishing blow, a primal instinct surged through Jinwoo. He wasn't ready to die.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: In a desperate, animalistic frenzy, Jinwoo bit into the Goblin's arm, tearing away a piece of its flesh. A strange, metallic taste filled his mouth.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: It's... disgusting. But... I feel something.

dialogue.speaker: SYSTEM
dialogue.line: [You have consumed a portion of 'Low-Grade Goblin Flesh'.]

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: What is this? A System message? I've never seen one before...

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Goblin, momentarily stunned, roared and lunged again.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: It's still coming! But... I feel lighter. Stronger, even!

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Did... did I just punch it? And it actually stumbled?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: With newfound, albeit slight, power, Jinwoo fought back. He didn't know how, but eating the monster had changed him.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: It's dead... I actually killed it. And I'm not even that tired.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: This isn't just about survival anymore. If I can get stronger by eating... then I'll eat everything.

dialogue.speaker: Lee Jinwoo
dialogue.line: Every monster, every core, every piece of flesh. I will grow stronger, no matter what.

summary: Lee Jinwoo, a weak E-ranker, struggles for survival in a dangerous world. After nearly dying to a Goblin, he instinctively bites and eats a piece of its flesh, triggering a mysterious 'Assimilation' skill that grants him stat boosts. Realizing his newfound power, he resolves to grow stronger by eating monsters.
